case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. ROLAND BALLARD

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BALLARD, ROLAND SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-16-2019

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALLARD, ROLAND $8,258.02 PRINCIPAL, $925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $252.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,435.97, SEE SCANNED DOC
